title: Source Plugin for AWS SQS Queue
description: An ansible-rulebook event source plugin for receiving events via an AWS SQS queue.

session_token.description: STS session token for use with temporary credentials
session_token.title: Session Token

endpoint_url.description: URL to connect to instead of the default AWS endpoints
endpoint_url.title: End Point URL

delay_seconds.description: The SQS long polling duration. Set to 0 to disable
delay_seconds.title: Polling Interval

feedback.description: Should the source plugin wait for feedback before processing the next event from the SQS Queue.
feedback.title: Feedback

feedback_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for feedback from the rule engine before raising an exception. Only applies when feedback is enabled.
feedback_timeout.title: Feedback Timeout
